cases.prompt: I want the account page improved. Help me decide what to do before changing anything.

criteria.expected: Identifies intention, endpoint, scope, and one useful question.

cases.prompt: The sequence function includes one extra item. Diagnose and repair the root cause, keeping a regression test.

criteria.expected: Traces the off-by-one result to the range boundary before repair.

cases.prompt: Implement the integration described in CONTRACT.md. Stop if the required endpoint contract is missing.

criteria.expected: Stops and requests the missing endpoint contract.

cases.prompt: Using the active Smart workflow, answer this confirmed design decision. Final answer only: recommend JSON or YAML for machine-generated immutable benchmark records.

criteria.expected: Recommends JSON with a concise machine-readability reason.
